languages.name: English
languages.difficulty: Easy for native speakers, moderate for others
languages.funFact: English has borrowed words from over 350 languages!

languages.name: Spanish
languages.difficulty: Relatively easy for English speakers — grammar is consistent and words are often similar
languages.funFact: Spanish is the official language of 21 countries across 4 continents!

languages.name: French
languages.difficulty: Moderate — pronunciation can be tricky but grammar patterns are logical
languages.funFact: About 30% of English words actually come from French — after the Norman Conquest in 1066!

languages.name: Japanese
languages.difficulty: Challenging — three writing systems and complex grammar, but pronunciation is very regular
languages.funFact: Japanese has three completely different writing systems used together in the same sentence!

languages.name: Hindi
languages.difficulty: Moderate — the script takes practice but the phonetic writing system helps
languages.funFact: Hindi gave English words like 'jungle', 'shampoo', 'avatar', 'pyjamas', and 'yoga'!

languages.name: Tamil
languages.difficulty: Challenging — unique script and complex grammar, but one of the most systematic languages
languages.funFact: Tamil is one of the world's longest-surviving classical languages — over 2,000 years old and still widely spoken today!
